detuning.convention: positive detuning magnitude Delta_Hz; dimensionless delta = 2 * Delta_Hz * 2*pi / Gamma_rad_s

fixed_operating_point.reason: The plot describes continuous-imaging destructiveness per frame, so it uses the active dissertation multishot probe power and pulse duration.

normalisation.rule: Each plotted curve is divided by its own maximum finite absolute value over the configured detuning range. Absolute values are saved in CSV.

figure.title: Detuning dependence of dispersive signal and scattering

caveats.calibration_status: No experimental RAI / absorption calibration has been applied.
caveats.kappa_F_status: The ideal 166Er atomic coefficient is fixed at kappa_F=-45/91; absolute apparatus response remains to be measured.
caveats.prediction_status: This is a representative physics trade-off plot, not a final operating-point prediction.
caveats.model_status: Uses the current scalar light-atom formulas; no microscopic Faraday model is introduced.
